title: 2025 Upgraded Extendable Feather Duster with Soft Silicone Cap, Telescopic Long Handled Microfiber Dusters for Cleaning, Cobweb High Ceiling Fan Roof Blinds Cars, Washable & Bendable
features: Attention: When using the feather duster on the wall, please bend the head at an angle to ensure it fits snugly against the wall as shown in the video. Maximizing the contact between feathers and walls can improve usage efficiency

Trap & Lock: The extendable feather duster extra long for high ceilings is crafted with microfiber material, offering excellent static attraction, enabling it to attract dust, hair, cobwebs, and allergens, stopping them from remaining on surfaces. This air duster significantly improves cleaning efficiency and effectiveness

Long & Extendable: The extendable pole is designed for tackling challenging areas like high ceilings, ceiling fans, blinds, cobwebs, etc., making this duster on a stick an excellent aid for household chores, and making dusting a breeze. It ensures you can easily and swiftly get through your chores, making it an essential tool for dealing with hard-to-reach dirt and stains

Convenient Storage & Cleaning: The telescopic dusters and foldable dusters for cleaning make storage easy and save valuable space. The telescopic pole features a convenient hanging design, making storage easy and ensuring quick access for future use. Additionally, the duster head is washable, allowing you to clean it with water and let it air dry, leaving you with a like-new cleaning tool

After-Sales Guarantee: Your satisfaction is our priority. We strictly control the quality of the extendable duster to ensure that you can receive the duster without defects. Contact us if you have any issues with our cleaning brush, and we’ll resolve them within 24 hours. Thanks for choosing Fogray
